summary: A handheld urban transit photo-collage style combining realistic crowded metro, bus, tram, or station snapshots with expressive marker-like cartoon doodles, oversized foreground gestures, white handwritten diary notes, and saturated comic face overlays.
prompt_template:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Metro Doodle Snapshot Diary" style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Foreground prop or product: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main handwritten text: "{MAIN_TEXT}".
Secondary handwritten text: "{SECONDARY_TEXT}".
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe style: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a realistic candid phone-photo as the base layer. The scene should feel like a real public transit or dense city moment: visible doors, rails, signs, floor markings, lights, scuffed surfaces, reflections, crowd density, practical clothing, and imperfect handheld framing.

Draw playful comic-marker doodles directly on top of the photo. Add saturated cartoon face overlays to selected people, thick black sketch outlines, red cheeks, exaggerated noses, messy hair, small sparks, arrows, underlines, and rough marker fill. Add one oversized illustrated foreground hand, ticket, transit card, phone, bag, food item, or gesture that overlaps the lower frame.

Place loose white handwritten diary text in natural negative space, usually near the upper-left. Keep the text personal, uneven, and marker-like. The final image should feel like a real city snapshot that someone humorously annotated afterward.

Avoid watermarks, usernames, platform logos, creator IDs, app marks, QR codes, clean vector-only illustration, fully illustrated backgrounds, polished ad layout, empty transit scenes, luxury lighting, perfect symmetry, branded mascots, identifiable celebrities, and tiny unreadable text.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, app mark, QR code, clean vector poster, fully illustrated background, polished advertising layout, luxury fashion shoot, empty train, sterile studio, perfect symmetry, glossy mascot illustration, identifiable celebrity, real public figure, tiny unreadable text

variables.SUBJECT: main person, group, object, or scene focus
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, ticket, transit card, phone, bag, food, or symbolic foreground doodle prop
variables.LOCATION: dense public urban transit or city location such as metro, bus, tram, platform, station gate, market, convenience store, or escalator
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: realistic crowd, signage, rails, doors, lights, posters, floor markings, reflections, grime, compression, and phone-photo details
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small handwritten date, route, mood note, or supporting annotation
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: separator or decorative symbol such as underline, arrow, sparkle, circle, or route mark
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual streetwear, backpacks, hoodies, caps, work jackets, sneakers, practical city clothes

variables.SUBJECT: a packed group of young commuters and friends
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: standing shoulder to shoulder inside a subway train doorway
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a giant hot-pink illustrated thumbs-up hand entering from the lower-left
variables.LOCATION: crowded Shanghai metro platform and train doorway
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: Line 9-style station signage, metal train doors, fluorescent car lighting, handrails, platform gap warning strip, crowd, reflections, and phone-camera grain
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: underlines, route circle, and small spark marks
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual streetwear, hoodies, backpacks, jackets, caps, tote bags, sneakers

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a 16:9 image in the Metro Doodle Snapshot Diary style. Use a horizontal crowded subway doorway composition with young commuters and friends centered inside the train. Add a giant hot-pink illustrated thumbs-up hand from the left foreground, colorful cartoon face overlays, thick black sketch outlines, red cheeks, messy hair, and white handwritten marker text reading "Shanghai Line 9" with "day 11" as a smaller note. Preserve realistic metro signage, metal doors, fluorescent lighting, platform gap warning strip, crowd density, reflections, and phone-camera grain. Avoid watermarks, usernames, platform logos, creator IDs, app marks, and QR codes.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a 9:16 image in the Metro Doodle Snapshot Diary style. Subject: a packed group of young commuters and friends standing shoulder to shoulder inside a subway train doorway. Foreground prop: a giant hot-pink illustrated thumbs-up hand entering from the lower-left. Location: crowded Shanghai metro platform and train doorway. Include Line 9-style station signage, metal train doors, fluorescent car lighting, handrails, platform gap warning strip, crowd, reflections, and phone-camera grain. Add colorful cartoon face overlays, thick black sketch outlines, red cheeks, messy hair, white handwritten marker text reading "Shanghai Line 9" with "day 11" as a smaller note, underlines, a route circle, and small spark marks. Keep the image realistic and handheld. Avoid watermarks, usernames, platform logos, creator IDs, app marks, and QR codes.
